requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（CS / IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（CS / IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires entering Cambodia are assessed for electrical safety against Cambodian Standards (CS) administered by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC). For general luminaires the relevant base is the IEC 60598-1 series (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which ISC commonly adopts as a national CS standard or applies through ASEAN-aligned references. Key safety aspects mirror the IEC text: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance, creepage and clearance distances, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminal/wiring requirements. Regulated electrical products are subject to ISC conformity and import inspection, and an in-country importer of record is typically required to present product documentation and test evidence at clearance through Sihanoukville or Phnom Penh. The product must be designed for the 230 V / 50 Hz Cambodian grid.
summary.zh: 进入柬埔寨的 LED 灯具按柬埔寨标准局（ISC）管理的柬埔寨标准（CS）进行电气安全评定。通用灯具的相关基础为 IEC 60598-1 系列（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），ISC 通常将其采纳为国家 CS 标准，或通过 ASEAN 对齐参考适用。核心安全方面与 IEC 文本一致：防触电、绝缘电阻、爬电距离与电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及端子/接线要求。受管制电气产品须经 ISC 合格评定与进口检验，通常须由在地进口记录人在西哈努克港或金边清关时提交产品文件与检测证据。产品须针对 230 V / 50 Hz 柬埔寨电网设计。
summary.zht: 進入柬埔寨的 LED 燈具按柬埔寨標準局（ISC）管理的柬埔寨標準（CS）進行電氣安全評定。通用燈具的相關基礎為 IEC 60598-1 系列（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），ISC 通常將其採納為國家 CS 標準，或通過 ASEAN 對齊參考適用。核心安全方面與 IEC 文本一致：防觸電、絕緣電阻、爬電距離與電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及端子/接線要求。受管制電氣產品須經 ISC 合格評定與進口檢驗，通常須由在地進口記錄人在西哈努克港或金邊清關時提交產品文件與檢測證據。產品須針對 230 V / 50 Hz 柬埔寨電網設計。

standards_or_laws: Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — Cambodian Standards (CS) framework and conformity / import inspection for regulated products
CS / IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (IEC base commonly adopted as a national CS standard or via ASEAN-aligned reference)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026, with the designation changing from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T. CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by applicable CNCA rules (CNCA-C10-01). CCC testing is performed by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Because GB 7000.1 and the IEC 60598-1 series share a common IEC base, the technical content is broadly aligned with the CS/IEC standard ISC applies, but the Chinese conformity assessment, CCC marking, and documentation are separate from the Cambodian import-inspection pathway.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T。范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则（CNCA-C10-01）决定。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。由于 GB 7000.1 与 IEC 60598-1 系列同以 IEC 为基础，其技术内容与 ISC 适用的 CS/IEC 标准大致一致，但中国合格评定、CCC 标志及文件均独立于柬埔寨进口检验路径。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T。範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則（CNCA-C10-01）決定。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。由於 GB 7000.1 與 IEC 60598-1 系列同以 IEC 為基礎，其技術內容與 ISC 適用的 CS/IEC 標準大致一致，但中國合格評定、CCC 標誌及文件均獨立於柬埔寨進口檢驗路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both Cambodia (via CS/IEC 60598-1) and China (via GB 7000.1) trace to the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the underlying safety tests are broadly comparable. The practical gaps are procedural rather than technical: (1) Chinese CCC certification and GB test reports are not automatically recognised in Cambodia — ISC conformity and import inspection apply, and an in-country importer of record is generally required; (2) the rating plate, EMC test mains and any voltage-dependent components must suit Cambodia's 230 V / 50 Hz grid, which shares China's 50 Hz frequency but differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase nominal voltage; (3) acceptance of foreign (including ILAC MRA) test reports versus a requirement for local re-testing should be confirmed with ISC and the importer for the specific product and HS code; (4) Cambodia does not impose an EU-style CE self-declaration or notified-body system — the route is national conformity / import inspection, not a regional mark.
gap.zh: 柬埔寨（经 CS/IEC 60598-1）与中国（经 GB 7000.1）均溯源至同一 IEC 60598-1 基础，故底层安全试验大致可比。实务差距主要是程序性而非技术性：（1）中国 CCC 认证与 GB 检测报告在柬埔寨不被自动认可——适用 ISC 合格评定与进口检验，通常须有在地进口记录人；（2）铭牌、EMC 试验电源及任何与电压相关的元件须适配柬埔寨 230 V / 50 Hz 电网，其 50 Hz 频率与中国一致，但不同于中国 220 V 单相 / 380 V 三相标称电压；（3）对境外（含 ILAC MRA）检测报告的接受程度，或是否要求本地重新检测，应就具体产品与 HS 编码向 ISC 及进口商确认；（4）柬埔寨不实行欧盟式 CE 自我声明或公告机构制度——其路径为国家合格评定/进口检验，而非区域性标志。
gap.zht: 柬埔寨（經 CS/IEC 60598-1）與中國（經 GB 7000.1）均溯源至同一 IEC 60598-1 基礎，故底層安全試驗大致可比。實務差距主要是程序性而非技術性：（1）中國 CCC 認證與 GB 檢測報告在柬埔寨不被自動認可——適用 ISC 合格評定與進口檢驗，通常須有在地進口記錄人；（2）銘牌、EMC 試驗電源及任何與電壓相關的元件須適配柬埔寨 230 V / 50 Hz 電網，其 50 Hz 頻率與中國一致，但不同於中國 220 V 單相 / 380 V 三相標稱電壓；（3）對境外（含 ILAC MRA）檢測報告的接受程度，或是否要求本地重新檢測，應就具體產品與 HS 編碼向 ISC 及進口商確認；（4）柬埔寨不實行歐盟式 CE 自我聲明或公告機構制度——其路徑為國家合格評定/進口檢驗，而非區域性標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity / import inspection under ISC where the luminaire is a regulated product; assessed against CS / IEC 60598-1; in-country importer of record typically required
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire is within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety for the Cambodian market is assessed against ISC-administered Cambodian Standards based on the IEC 60598-1 series, through national conformity and import inspection rather than an EU-style CE mark. Chinese CCC certification and GB/T 7000.1-2023 evidence do not automatically satisfy the Cambodian route. Although the IEC base is shared, exporters should confirm with ISC and a local importer whether foreign test reports are accepted or local re-testing is required, and ensure the product is rated for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨市场的 LED 灯具电气安全依据 ISC 管理、以 IEC 60598-1 系列为基础的柬埔寨标准评定，通过国家合格评定与进口检验，而非欧盟式 CE 标志。中国 CCC 认证及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 证据不自动满足柬埔寨路径。尽管同以 IEC 为基础，出口商应向 ISC 及在地进口商确认境外检测报告是否被接受或须本地重新检测，并确保产品适配 230 V / 50 Hz 电网。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨市場的 LED 燈具電氣安全依據 ISC 管理、以 IEC 60598-1 系列為基礎的柬埔寨標準評定，通過國家合格評定與進口檢驗，而非歐盟式 CE 標誌。中國 CCC 認證及 GB/T 7000.1-2023 證據不自動滿足柬埔寨路徑。儘管同以 IEC 為基礎，出口商應向 ISC 及在地進口商確認境外檢測報告是否被接受或須本地重新檢測，並確保產品適配 230 V / 50 Hz 電網。

requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（CS / IEC 62560）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（CS / IEC 62560）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (integrated retrofit lamps with caps such as E27 / B22) exported to Cambodia are assessed for safety against the IEC 62560 base (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage greater than 50 V — Safety specifications), which ISC adopts or references as a Cambodian Standard. The standard covers cap/holder compatibility, insulation and dielectric strength, creepage and clearance, torque and mechanical strength, resistance to heat and fire, and fault conditions. Regulated lamps fall under ISC conformity and import inspection; the in-country importer presents documentation at clearance. Lamps must be suited to the 230 V / 50 Hz mains.
summary.zh: 出口柬埔寨的自镇流 LED 灯（带 E27 / B22 等灯头的一体化替换灯）按 IEC 62560 基础（普通照明用电压大于 50 V 的自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评定安全性，ISC 将其采纳或参考为柬埔寨标准。该标准涵盖灯头/灯座兼容性、绝缘与介电强度、爬电距离与电气间隙、扭矩与机械强度、耐热与耐火性及故障状态。受管制灯具适用 ISC 合格评定与进口检验；在地进口商于清关时提交文件。灯具须适配 230 V / 50 Hz 电源。
summary.zht: 出口柬埔寨的自鎮流 LED 燈（帶 E27 / B22 等燈頭的一體化替換燈）按 IEC 62560 基礎（普通照明用電壓大於 50 V 的自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評定安全性，ISC 將其採納或參考為柬埔寨標準。該標準涵蓋燈頭/燈座兼容性、絕緣與介電強度、爬電距離與電氣間隙、扭矩與機械強度、耐熱與耐火性及故障狀態。受管制燈具適用 ISC 合格評定與進口檢驗；在地進口商於清關時提交文件。燈具須適配 230 V / 50 Hz 電源。

standards_or_laws: CS / IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage greater than 50 V — Safety specifications (IEC base adopted / referenced by ISC)
Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — conformity and import inspection for regulated lamps

summary.en: China's self-ballasted LED lamp safety standard is GB 24906-2010 / the GB 24906 series (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety requirements), aligned to IEC 62560, with CCC certification required for in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps under CNCA rules. CCC testing is carried out by CNCA-authorized laboratories. The Chinese safety content is broadly comparable to the IEC 62560 base that ISC applies, but CCC certification and GB test reports are separate from, and not automatically recognised under, the Cambodian conformity / import-inspection pathway.
summary.zh: 中国自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24906 系列（普通照明用电压大于 50 V 的自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐；范围内自镇流 LED 灯依 CNCA 规则须取得 CCC 认证。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。中国安全内容与 ISC 适用的 IEC 62560 基础大致可比，但 CCC 认证及 GB 检测报告独立于柬埔寨合格评定/进口检验路径，且不被自动认可。
summary.zht: 中國自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24906 系列（普通照明用電壓大於 50 V 的自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊；範圍內自鎮流 LED 燈依 CNCA 規則須取得 CCC 認證。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。中國安全內容與 ISC 適用的 IEC 62560 基礎大致可比，但 CCC 認證及 GB 檢測報告獨立於柬埔寨合格評定/進口檢驗路徑，且不被自動認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 series — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety requirements (aligned to IEC 62560)
CNCA CCC rules for self-ballasted LED lamps

gap.en: As both the Cambodian (CS/IEC 62560) and Chinese (GB 24906) standards derive from IEC 62560, the lamp safety test content is largely common. The gaps are again procedural and grid-related: (1) CCC and Chinese GB reports are not automatically accepted — ISC conformity / import inspection governs Cambodian entry, normally via an in-country importer; (2) cap/base systems and the rated voltage must suit Cambodia's 230 V / 50 Hz mains (50 Hz matches China, 230 V differs from China's 220 V); (3) whether ILAC MRA-recognised foreign test reports are accepted, or local sampling/re-testing is required, should be confirmed with ISC for the specific lamp type and import volume; (4) marking and packaging language requirements should be confirmed with the importer. There is no EU-style harmonised standard presumption-of-conformity mechanism in Cambodia.
gap.zh: 由于柬埔寨（CS/IEC 62560）与中国（GB 24906）标准均源自 IEC 62560，灯具安全试验内容基本共通。差距同样为程序性与电网相关：（1）CCC 与中国 GB 报告不被自动接受——柬埔寨入境由 ISC 合格评定/进口检验管辖，通常经在地进口商；（2）灯头/灯座系统及额定电压须适配柬埔寨 230 V / 50 Hz 电源（50 Hz 与中国一致，230 V 不同于中国 220 V）；（3）是否接受 ILAC MRA 认可的境外检测报告，或须本地抽样/重新检测，应就具体灯型与进口量向 ISC 确认；（4）标志与包装语言要求应向进口商确认。柬埔寨没有欧盟式协调标准符合性推定机制。
gap.zht: 由於柬埔寨（CS/IEC 62560）與中國（GB 24906）標準均源自 IEC 62560，燈具安全試驗內容基本共通。差距同樣為程序性與電網相關：（1）CCC 與中國 GB 報告不被自動接受——柬埔寨入境由 ISC 合格評定/進口檢驗管轄，通常經在地進口商；（2）燈頭/燈座系統及額定電壓須適配柬埔寨 230 V / 50 Hz 電源（50 Hz 與中國一致，230 V 不同於中國 220 V）；（3）是否接受 ILAC MRA 認可的境外檢測報告，或須本地抽樣/重新檢測，應就具體燈型與進口量向 ISC 確認；（4）標誌與包裝語言要求應向進口商確認。柬埔寨沒有歐盟式協調標準符合性推定機制。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity / import inspection under ISC for regulated self-ballasted LED lamps; assessed against CS / IEC 62560; in-country importer of record typically required
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps under CNCA rules; GB 24906 series is the applicable safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamp safety for Cambodia is assessed against the IEC 62560 base as applied by ISC through national conformity and import inspection. Chinese CCC certification and GB 24906 evidence do not automatically satisfy the Cambodian route. Because the IEC base is shared, confirm with ISC and a local importer whether foreign reports are accepted or local re-testing is needed, and ensure the lamp is rated for 230 V / 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨自镇流 LED 灯安全依据 ISC 适用的 IEC 62560 基础，通过国家合格评定与进口检验评定。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 24906 证据不自动满足柬埔寨路径。因同以 IEC 为基础，应向 ISC 及在地进口商确认境外报告是否被接受或须本地重新检测，并确保灯具额定为 230 V / 50 Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨自鎮流 LED 燈安全依據 ISC 適用的 IEC 62560 基礎，通過國家合格評定與進口檢驗評定。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 24906 證據不自動滿足柬埔寨路徑。因同以 IEC 為基礎，應向 ISC 及在地進口商確認境外報告是否被接受或須本地重新檢測，並確保燈具額定為 230 V / 50 Hz。
